message:
fix: address 5 bugs found by codebase scan

- cost-analytics.ts: /forecasts/:forecastId/scenarios now uses
  getForecastById() instead of ignoring the URL parameter (bd-abxa)
- agent.ts: add .catch() to fire-and-forget handleAgentEvents() call
  to prevent unhandled promise rejections (bd-9a8j)
- base-driver.ts: fix off-by-one in output buffer trim (>= to >)
  so buffer reaches configured capacity (bd-24xi)
- dashboards.ts: validate visibility query param against allowed
  DashboardVisibility values before type cast (bd-1qwe)
- pipeline.service.ts: add UNSAFE_CONTEXT_KEYS guard to
  substituteVariables path traversal (bd-1lqg)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
